creator: pierre@freebsdfoundation.org
text:
Created attachment 243611
0001-netconfig-add-support-for-setting-network-proxies.patch

The patch attached adds a prompt after the "netconfig" phase, allowing users to set a HTTP or a FTP proxy.

I have tested it successfully in isolation on a stripped-down copy of bsdinstall, found at at https://github.com/khorben/bsdinstall.
